hero.subhead: SOBI CRM carries a lead from first message to signed contract — conversion, AI scoring, contracts, and campaigns in one connected system.

problem.subhead: Messages get lost in inboxes. Follow-ups get forgotten. Contracts live in someone's email. SOBI CRM gives every lead a durable path to close.

points.title: Leads go cold in shared inboxes
Contracts live in someone's email, not a system
No one can see what's actually about to close

problem.flowRaw: "We run 40 trucks and need better dispatch visibility…"

steps.headline: Four steps from first message to signed deal.

items.title: Capture
items.desc: Website form and chatbot intake land in one shared leads queue.

items.title: Convert
items.desc: A deliberate conversion turns a lead into a Contact, Company, and Deal.

items.title: Close
items.desc: AI drafts the contract; clients review, print, and accept online.

items.title: Grow
items.desc: AI-personalized campaigns and reporting keep the pipeline moving.

analytics.headline: See what's actually closing.
analytics.body: Conversion funnel, lead sources, and monthly revenue in one view — no spreadsheet required.

solutions.eyebrow: BUILT FOR HOW YOUR BUSINESS WORKS
solutions.headline: One CRM core, adapted to your industry.

tabs.label: Insurance
tabs.headline: Policies, renewals, and claims in one pipeline.
tabs.body: Track carriers and products alongside every policy, with renewal reminders before they lapse.
tabs.quote: We stopped missing renewal windows because the reminder lives next to the policy, not in a spreadsheet.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Real Estate
tabs.headline: Match clients to properties, not just contacts.
tabs.body: Viewings, offers, and contracts stay attached to both the client and the property.
tabs.quote: Every offer has the full viewing history attached — no more piecing it together from email.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Immigration
tabs.headline: Cases, deadlines, and required documents tracked together.
tabs.body: Each case carries its visa type, authority submissions, and document checklist in one place.
tabs.quote: Deadlines used to live in someone's calendar. Now they live on the case itself.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Barber Shop
tabs.headline: Appointments and walk-ins, one shared book.
tabs.body: Staff, chairs, and visit history in a single booking view.
tabs.quote: Walk-ins and bookings finally share one calendar instead of two systems.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Beauty Salon
tabs.headline: Treatment series and consent, handled properly.
tabs.body: Before/after photos and signed consent forms travel with the client record.
tabs.quote: Consent forms used to be paper in a drawer. Now they're on the client's profile.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Restaurant
tabs.headline: Reservations, allergies, and catering leads together.
tabs.body: Guest profiles carry allergy notes and history; catering leads flow through the same pipeline.
tabs.quote: The host stand finally knows what the kitchen needs to know.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tabs.label: Sales & Agency
tabs.headline: Campaigns and targets alongside the pipeline.
tabs.body: Proposals, performance, and personalized campaigns share the same contact and deal data.
tabs.quote: Our campaign follow-ups finally know which deals are actually open.
tabs.author: Fictional demo persona

tiers.name: Team

faq.headline: What teams ask before they start.

items.q: Do I need an AI API key?
items.a: No. Every AI feature has a graceful, keyless fallback — lead scoring, content suggestions, and drafts still work; connecting a real provider just improves quality.

items.q: Is my data isolated from other tenants?
items.a: Yes. Tenant isolation is enforced at the data layer, not just per-screen — it's structurally impossible for one workspace to read another's records.

items.q: Can I activate only the modules I need?
items.a: Yes. Insurance, Real Estate, Immigration, and the service-booking modules are each opt-in per workspace.
The demo workspace uses realistic seeded data you can freely edit, convert, and delete — nothing here represents a real customer.

items.q: Is the contract template legally reviewed?
items.a: It's a generated starting point, not legal advice — review any contract with your own counsel before sending it to a real client.

cta.subhead: Explore a complete demo workspace with leads, deals, contracts, and campaigns already connected.

footer.tagline: Every lead, carried to a close.

platformAdmin.pricingDesc: Rows shown on the public pricing section, translated per locale. Leave empty to keep the built-in demo plans.
platformAdmin.contentDesc: Override specific landing-page strings per locale. Leave a field empty to keep the built-in copy.
platformAdmin.brandingDesc: Point the logo and favicon at externally-hosted image URLs — used everywhere the SOBI CRM wordmark appears.
platformAdmin.custom: Custom pricing (shows the text as-is, e.g. "Contact us")
platformAdmin.name: Name
platformAdmin.noPlans: No custom plans yet — the landing page is showing its built-in defaults.
platformAdmin.deletePlanConfirm: Delete this plan? This can't be undone.
platformAdmin.overridePlaceholder: Leave empty to use the default copy
platformAdmin.announcementDesc: A promo/notice strip shown at the top of the landing page and the in-app workspace.
